title: DNS Gateway Lookup Configuration
description: Configuration for the dns-gateway lookup network filter, the virtual-IP resolution half of the dns-gateway extension set.

filter_state_prefix.description: Prefix for filter state keys written by the dns-gateway lookup filter. Downstream filters read domain and metadata under this prefix. Default: "io.builtonenvoy.dns_gateway".

domain_metadata.description: If set, also publish the resolved domain as Envoy connection dynamic metadata under the given namespace/key. Useful for consumers that read dynamic metadata rather than filter state (e.g. a network ext_authz filter with metadata_context_namespaces). Omit to publish filter state only.

key.description: Key within the namespace whose string value is the resolved domain (e.g. "domain").
